title: Make quick tip icon clickable with section navigation

requirements.text: Make the quick tip icon (lightbulb icon) clickable in the educational content sections

quotes: make the quick tip icon clickable

acceptanceCriteria: Quick tip icons are interactive elements that respond to clicks
Visual feedback is provided on hover to indicate clickability
Icon maintains its current styling and position

requirements.text: When a quick tip icon is clicked, navigate directly to the corresponding section within the current educational content

quotes: send it directly to the proper section

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the icon smoothly scrolls to the associated section
The target section becomes visible in the viewport
Navigation works for all quick tip icons across different pest content pages

constraints: Preserve existing UI component structure and styling
Maintain current icon design and placement
Do not modify read-only paths like frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the visual design of quick tip icons
Adding new quick tips or content
